characters.name: Edweena
characters.description: EdweenaPhysical descriptionSpeciesElephantGenderFemale Edweena is an elephant. Like most elephants, she has a long trunk and big floppy ears. She also has black eyebrows and big eyes with black pupils. Edweena is a gentle giant like Thunder. Although she's gentle around everyone, her snores and her sneezes can be very powerful. Edweena is a gentle giant like Thunder. Although she's gentle around everyone, her snores and her sneezes can be very powerful. But however, Edweena is really nice and has a huge heart.

characters.name: Hazel
characters.description: HazelPhysical descriptionSpeciesSquirrelGenderFemale Hazel is a little orange squirrel. She has a red nose and long whiskers. She also has two ears, black eyebrows and eyes with black pupils. Hazel also has a big bushy tail. Hazel is the acorn-loving squirrel. She is fun, feisty and giggly, who loves gathering acrons. Like Mouse, Hazel doesn't like swimming or she becomes a squirrel with a wet tail, which she describes as "soggy and not pretty". Hazel spends most of her time dealing with her acorns. Hazel is the acorn-loving squirrel. She is fun, feisty and giggly, who loves gathering acrons. characters.name: Jasper
characters.description: JasperPhysical descriptionSpeciesCrocodileGenderMale Jasperis one of the recurring characters ofMy Friend Rabbit.Voiced by Milton Barnes. Jasper is a crocodile. He has white eyes with black pupils and he has black eyebrows. Like most crocodiles, Jasper has a long snout with lots of teeth inside, and he has a long tail. Jasper is the voice of reason and loves to go fishing. Of all the characters, he seems to be the most mature and knows many things the others don't. When the other characters need to know something, they often go to him for sage advice.

characters.name: Mouse
characters.description: MousePhysical descriptionSpeciesMouseGenderMale Mouse is one of the main characters of My Friend Rabbit along with Rabbit. Voiced by Richard Binsley. Mouse has light brown fur all around him, except for on his stomach, which is an apricot color. He has ears about as big as his head. Above his black nose there are three whiskers. Mouse gets into all situations, just like Rabbit. He doesn't like water or swimming.
characters.personality_section: Mouse gets into all situations, just like Rabbit. He doesn't like water or swimming.

characters.name: Rabbit
characters.description: RabbitPhysical descriptionSpeciesRabbitGenderMaleRabbit is a fictional main character as well as the titular character in the Australian/Canadian animated TV series My Friend Rabbit. He was voiced byPeter Oldring. Rabbit is a white rabbit with a pudge like nose and black eyebrows. The highlights inside of his ears are grey. Rabbit is mouse's best friend and he is kind and sharing. He also gets into some types of situations and tries "hop-thinking". His favorite thing to say is "Thump-eka!". Rabbit is mouse's best friend and he is kind and sharing. He also gets into some types of situations and tries "hop-thinking". His favorite thing to say is "Thump-eka!".

characters.name: The Gibble Goose Girls
characters.description: The Gibble Goose GirlsPhysical descriptionSpeciesGeeseGenderFemale (all) The Gibble Goose Girls are all very alike. They have white eyes with black pupils and black eyebrows. They also have orange beaks and webbed feet. And they all have white feathers. The Gibble Goose Girls are like sisters to each other. They go and do everything together. They each have their own personality but are almost never seen alone. They are kind, and they enjoy spending their time together, and enjoy activities such as water racing, swimming, and dancing. When they talk, they tend to do it all at once: one girl will start a sentence, and each other girl will complete part of the sentence until they finish. characters.name: Thunder
characters.description: ThunderPhysical descriptionSpeciesRhinocerosGenderMale Thunder is one of the main characters and the largest male in My Friend Rabbit, voiced by Jeremy Harris. Thunder is an obese purple rhino with a large nose and buck teeth. On his belly is a 6-like bellybutton, as well as wrinkles across his cheeks and eyes and a small tail. His eyebrows are black like all other characters, and the inside of his ears are greyish-purple. Thunder is a very shy gentle giant, and is also cute, sweet, and cheerful. His favorite thing is singing. He frequently tends to be slower than the other characters, but is easily scared of some things that live in dark places.  Whenever he speaks he tends to say "I can do"I can do..."
